query:
-- Total request-date rows (non-withdrawn, active employees, non-ancillary, vacation only)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_request_dates,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rdd.decision IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_no_decision,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rdd.decision = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approved,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rdd.decision = 'denied' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS denied
FROM request_dates rd
JOIN requests r ON r.id = rd.request_id
JOIN employees e ON e.id = r.employee_id
LEFT JOIN request_date_decisions rdd ON rdd.request_id = rd.request_id AND rdd.date = rd.date
WHERE r.status != 'withdrawn'
  AND e.isActive = 1
  AND (e.category IS NULL OR e.category != 'ancillary')
  AND r.request_type = 'vacation';
